# DomyDomains
> Domain search platform helping you find, compare, and register domain names across every major TLD.

## Main Pages
- [Home](https://domydomains.com/)
- [Domain Extensions](https://domydomains.com/domain-extensions)
- [Domain Generator](https://domydomains.com/domain-generator)
- [Premium Domains](https://domydomains.com/premium-domains)
- [Domain Pricing](https://domydomains.com/domain-pricing)
- [WHOIS Lookup](https://domydomains.com/whois-lookup)
- [Domain Value](https://domydomains.com/domain-value)
- [About](https://domydomains.com/about)
- [Blog](https://domydomains.com/blog)
